news.title: S&P 500 notches first close above 7,100, Nasdaq posts longest win streak since 1992: Live updates
news.description: U.S. stocks rose on Friday after Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz "completely open" on the heels of a ceasefire announcement between Israel and Lebanon.

news.title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
news.description: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

news.title: Anthropic's Dario Amodei to meet with White House about Mythos
news.description: The meeting comes less than two months after President Donald Trump blacklisted Anthropic.

news.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras files to go public after scrapping IPO plans last year
news.description: Cerebras has an expanded deal with OpenAI in hand as it tries again to go public, one person said.

news.title: Netflix was long 'a builder not a buyer.' Is that era over?
news.description: Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos said during an investor call that the company built its "M&A muscle" during its pursuit of WBD's assets.

news.title: Earnings poised to stoke confidence in a stock market that has rebounded to all-time highs. Here's what's ahead
news.description: The fast-moving developments on the warfront add to confidence in many parts of the Street that the bottom is in for equities.

news.title: AMD, Oracle, Microsoft and the IGV lead a monster week for tech stocks
news.description: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft are on pace for historic weeks, while Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor are all roaring in April.

news.title: Three things to know about FISA Section 702: Congress passes short-term extension of controversial surveillance program
news.description: The law allows the U.S. government to surveil people outside the U.S., including when they're communicating with American citizens.

news.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait of Hormuz 'open' during ceasefire
news.description: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

news.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
news.description: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cyber-security weaknesses.

news.title: UK petrol and diesel prices fall after weeks of rises
news.description: Drivers have seen weeks of increases as the US-Israeli war with Iran pushed up wholesale oil prices.

news.title: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
news.description: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.

news.title: Rising value of Pokémon cards sparks smash and grab crime spree
news.description: Small shops across the UK are being targeted by thieves stealing collectibles worth thousands of pounds.

news.title: Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
news.description: Firms say digital twins make staff more productive, but are they a potential legal minefield?

news.title: AI minister Kendall says she doesn't use AI at work
news.description: The Science, Innovation and Technology Secretary this week unveiled a £500m fund to boost British AI firms.

news.title: What is Claude Mythos and what risks does it pose?
news.description: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.

news.title: Perspective: AI demand is inflated, and only Anthropic is being realistic
news.description: The main usage metric for artificial intelligence, called tokens, looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated.

news.title: U.S. tech companies ramp up government lobbying amid Iran war uncertainty
news.description: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.

news.title: Nvidia AI chip rivals attract record funding as competition heats up
news.description: A growing crop of startups are set on challenging the chip giant's supremacy.

news.title: Uber Eats has a fix for pesky returns. You can just sit on the couch
news.description: The Uber Eats return pickup feature applies to items bought through the app from Best Buy, Dick's Sporting Goods, Petco and more.

chinaNews.title: 欧洲央行管委Kazaks：下一步利率行动未必会是加息
chinaNews.description: 欧洲央行管理委员会成员Martins Kazaks表示，欧洲央行下一步利率行动未必会是加息。 尽管他目前认为没有理由质疑市场对今年加息两次的预期，但这只是多种可能情形之一。

chinaNews.description: 据媒体援引三位未具名知情人士报道，Meta计划于5月20日进行一轮裁员，全球约10%的员工将受到影响，之后还将有进一步裁员。
